title: Deliver plan-fix verdict
description: Output shape when Deliver Agent authors a fix-iteration sub-sprint in response to Code Reviewer fix_required OR Path 3 Acceptance gap brief. Produces objective_md + dev_prompt_md as inline markdown for the orchestrator (or human) to write to filesystem.

layers.description: Fix-layer set for this sub-sprint. Universal base + profile-specific extension layers.

modules.description: Repo paths the sub-sprint will touch. Must be subset of charter.approved_scope.modules_in_scope per scope_envelope_check.

objective_md.description: Inline markdown body for the new docs/sprint_objective.md.

dev_prompt_md.description: Inline markdown body for the new compact/sprint-NNN-dev-prompt.md. MUST include context_budget front-matter with self_contained: true (Constitution §1.4-i).

input_path.description: Which Deliver input path triggered this plan-fix.

input_artifact_ref.description: Optional path to triggering artifact (research-brief id, failure-brief id, or acceptance-report id + checkpoint id for Path 3).
